name: World Wildlife Fund
mission: Protecting the future of nature.
description: WWF works in nearly 100 countries to conserve nature and reduce threats to wildlife, forests, and oceans.

name: Doctors Without Borders
mission: Medical aid where it is needed most.
description: MSF provides lifesaving medical care to people affected by conflict, epidemics, and disasters worldwide.

name: UNICEF
mission: For every child, a fair chance.
description: UNICEF works in over 190 countries to save children's lives, defend their rights, and help them fulfill their potential.

name: Red Cross
mission: Preventing and alleviating human suffering.
description: The Red Cross provides emergency assistance, disaster relief, and education in communities worldwide.

name: Oxfam
mission: Fighting inequality to end poverty.
description: Oxfam tackles the root causes of poverty and injustice, helping communities build better futures.

name: RSPCA
mission: For every animal, a life worth living.
description: The RSPCA prevents cruelty, promotes kindness, and alleviates suffering of animals across Australia and beyond.

name: St. Jude Children's Research Hospital
mission: Finding cures. Saving children.
description: St. Jude leads the way in treating and defeating childhood cancer and other life-threatening diseases.

name: The Nature Conservancy
mission: Conserving the lands and waters on which all life depends.
description: TNC protects ecologically important lands and waters for nature and people around the globe.

name: Save the Children
mission: Every child deserves a future.
description: Save the Children gives children a healthy start, the opportunity to learn, and protection from harm.

name: Amnesty International
mission: Defending human rights worldwide.
description: Amnesty campaigns for a world where human rights are enjoyed by all, free from fear and discrimination.

name: Water.org
mission: Safe water and sanitation for all.
description: Water.org brings safe water and sanitation to communities through affordable financing solutions.

name: Best Friends Animal Society
mission: Save them all.
description: Best Friends works to end the killing of dogs and cats in America's shelters through adoption programs.

name: Cancer Research UK
mission: Together we will beat cancer.
description: CRUK funds world-class research to help prevent, diagnose, and treat cancer more effectively.

name: Greenpeace
mission: Protecting life on Earth.
description: Greenpeace uses peaceful protest and creative communication to expose global environmental problems.

name: Plan International
mission: Advancing children's rights and equality for girls.
description: Plan International works with children and communities in over 75 countries to create lasting change.

name: Habitat for Humanity
mission: Building strength, stability, and self-reliance through shelter.
description: Habitat helps families build and improve places to call home, supporting communities worldwide.

name: World Food Programme
mission: Saving lives, changing lives.
description: WFP is the world's largest humanitarian organization fighting hunger and promoting food security.

name: Sea Shepherd
mission: Defending, conserving, and protecting marine wildlife.
description: Sea Shepherd uses direct-action tactics to investigate, document, and take action to protect marine ecosystems.

name: Alzheimer's Association
mission: A world without Alzheimer's and all other dementia.
description: The Alzheimer's Association leads the way to end Alzheimer's through research, care, and support.

name: PETA
mission: Animals are not ours to experiment on, eat, wear, use for entertainment, or abuse.
description: PETA focuses on areas where animals suffer the most and works to create a more compassionate world.

name: Room to Read
mission: World change starts with children's education.
description: Room to Read transforms the lives of millions of children through literacy and gender equality in education.

name: Direct Relief
mission: Improving the health and lives of people affected by poverty and emergencies.
description: Direct Relief provides essential medical resources to communities in need around the world.

name: Rainforest Alliance
mission: Creating a more sustainable world.
description: The Rainforest Alliance works to conserve biodiversity and ensure sustainable livelihoods.

name: Make-A-Wish Foundation
mission: Granting life-changing wishes for children with critical illnesses.
description: Make-A-Wish creates hope and joy for children battling critical illnesses through wish experiences.
